pyMediaManager
  • API Reference
  • User Interface
  • View page source

User Interface

Note

UI module documentation is currently limited due to Qt dependencies. For full UI details, please refer to the source code.

Main Window

Main application window (Qt-based, see source code for details).

Views

Storage View, Plugin View, and Project View provide the main UI functionality.

Components

First Run Wizard and configuration dialogs guide initial setup.

Dialogs

Project Browser, Project Wizard, and Settings Dialog manage user interactions.
